SavedPrediction.title: SavedPrediction
SavedPrediction.description: A prediction record saved by a user with custom annotation or notes.

userId.description: Firebase Auth UID of the user who saved this prediction.

predictedNumbers.description: Six excluded numbers from 1 to 49 calculated or cached at that period.

notes.description: Custom comments or analysis notes written by the user.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the record was saved.

UserTracker.title: UserTracker
UserTracker.description: Active target trackers configured by a user for specific numbers.

monitoredNumbers.description: Numbers (1-49) the user is actively tracking for gap indicators.

/saved_predictions/{predictionId}.description: Collection of user-saved predictions and custom notes.

/user_trackers/{trackerId}.description: A singleton per-user tracking list for monitoring alerts.
